name: Garlic Bread (Eb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the water, bread flour, sugar, salt, butter, parmesan cheese, sweet basil, garlic powder, and garlic paste in a bowl until well mixed.
2. Shape the dough into a round loaf.
3. Place the loaf on a baking sheet.
4. Bake according to your oven's regular cycle settings.
